case_title: MARTINEZ CONSUELO GUADALUPE VS AREVALO TITO et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $622.50 FILED BY MARTINEZ CONSUELO GUADALUPE AS TO DEFENDANT AREVALO TITO AREVALO ANGELICA DIAZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
